items.name: NARS Lip Crossbody Bag 3.0
items.description: Who doesn't love a bold, red lip? Flaunt your fondness for lipstick with this playful NARS crossbody lip bag in shade Heat Wave. Designed for the 3.0 body. Item created by 0929lego.

items.name: Lip Guard Grills
items.description: Lip Guard Grills to complete your game day look with your favorite team's helmet.

items.name: NARS Lip Crossbody Bag 1.0
items.description: Who doesn't love a bold, red lip? Flaunt your fondness for lipstick with this playful NARS crossbody lip bag in shade Heat Wave. Designed for the 1.0 blocky body. Item created by 0929lego.

items.name: Celestial Lips
items.description: Gold stars, a crescent moon, and a shimmer that says you don't belong to this planet.

items.name: Supernova Lips
items.description: Red and pink sparkle that hits like a star at full brightness. Turn it down? Nah.

items.name: Main Character Lips
items.description: Golden eyes, red lip, clean brows. No extras needed — you already have the part.

items.name: Dark Ombré Lip
items.description: Black on the outside, deep crimson bleeding through the center.

items.name: Cloud Nine Lips
items.description: Soft lavender streaks and purple lips - the look you get when your head floats past the clouds and keeps going. Why come back down?

items.name: Y2K Dream Lips
items.description: Hot pink lips, blue-violet eyes, and a butterfly that landed and decided to stay. Early 2000s energy, fully recharged.

items.name: Mermaid Lips
items.description: Iridescent scales, a soft pink lip, and a glow that looks like you just surfaced from somewhere magical. Land-dwellers could never.

items.name: Honeycomb Lips
items.description: Head-to-toe gold with detail that says you didn't come to blend in. Sweet on the outside, bold underneath.

items.name: Smoke & Velvet Lips
items.description: Dark smoky eyes, a bold red lip, and just enough sparkle to catch the light. For nights that start late and end never.

items.name: Crystal Quest Lips
items.description: You went looking for treasure and came back wearing it. Jewel-encrusted eyes and an ice-blue lip for when subtle isn't on the map.
